title: RefinementList count inconsistent with actual filtered results
body: ### 🐛 Current behavior ## Summary Hi guys, when using `useRefinementList` hook with InstantSearch and MeiliSearch, the `item.count` values displayed in RefinementList components do not match the actual number of results returned after applying the filters. The counts shown in the refinement list are consistently lower than or equal to the actual filtered result count. ## Network Request Evidence ### Single Filter Request and Response ``` multi-search simplified request payload: { "queries": [ { "indexUid": "index_5179", "facets": [ "body", "make", "model", ... "vehType", ], "limit": 13, "offset": 0 } ] } Simplified Response: { "results": [ { "indexUid": "index_5179", "hits": [ ...hits ], "query": "", "processingTimeMs": 13, "limit": 13, "offset": 0, "estimatedTotalHits": 1130, "facetDistribution": { "model": { "3": 2, "6": 1, "308": 22, "408": 9, "2008": 26, "3008": 28, ... }, "vehType": { "Demo": 178, "New": 649, "Used": 303 }, }, } ] } ``` ## Screenshot Evidence As demonstrated in the screenshot above, when applying only the model:"2008" filter, the facetDistribution returns a count of 26, while the actual search results contain 29 items. This discrepancy has been verified by logging `instantSearchInstance.mainIndex.getResults()?.nbHits` within my middleware, which correctly returns 29. ## Additional Context - This issue occurs consistently across different filter attributes - The problem is observable in both development and production environments - Multi-search network requests show the same incorrect counts as displayed in the UI ## Questions 1. Is this a known issue with the MeiliSearch InstantSearch integration? 2. Are there any configuration options or settings that might resolve this discrepancy? 3. Could this issue be related? [Meilisearch Discussion #4501](https://github.com/meilisearch/meilisearch/discussions/4501) and [Meilisearch Issue #4634](https://github.com/meilisearch/meilisearch/issues/4634) ### 🔍 Steps to reproduce ## Code Setup ### Simplified InstantSearch Configuration ```javascript const { searchClient } = instantMeiliSearch( process.env.GATSBY_SEARCH_URL || '', process.env.GATSBY_SEARCH_TOKEN, { primaryKey: 'id', } ) ``` ### RefinementList Hook Usage ```javascript const { items, refine, canRefine, canToggleShowMore, isShowingMore, searchForItems, toggleShowMore } = useRefinementList({ attribute, operator, showMore: false, sortBy, limit, showMoreLimit, }) ``` ### Live reproduction Sorry, can't replicate the issue. We have hosted 20 sites using the same setup and this bug only appears on one of them ### 💭 Expected behavior ## Current Behavior - RefinementList displays counts (`item.count`) that are lower than the actual number of results - Network tab shows incorrect results in multi-search requests - Discrepancy occurs in both single and multiple filter scenarios ## Expected Behavior - RefinementList `item.count` should accurately reflect the number of results that will be returned when that filter is applied - Network requests should return consistent and correct result counts ### Package version - **InstantSearch**: `react-instantsearch: ^7.13.6`, - **MeiliSearch**: `meilisearch: ^0.45.0` and `@meilisearch/instant-meilisearch: ^0.22.0`, ### Operating system macOS ### Browser Chrome ### Code of Conduct - [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct

labels.description: Issues to be categorized by the team
labels.name: triage
